ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var transactionType = attributes.queryParams.transactionType var checkType = attributes.queryParams.checkType default "default" var mappingName = transactionType ++ checkType ++ ".dwl"
--- readUrl('classpath://dwl/post-p21-entity-processing-subflow/v_' ++ mappingName,'text/plain')
